name: CWS Light Table HTML Editing Guide
rules: Treat the workbook JSON in script#websheet-model as the source of truth.
Keep JSON valid when editing workbook data.
Preserve the single-sheet structure expected by this lightweight editor.
Do not add formula, style, image, comment, or drawing structures unless the application explicitly supports them.
Keep header-row and grid-limit metadata inside sheet.cwsLight when present.
